title: Eliminate runtime component update false positives
forbidden_changes: Weakening runtime package digest or signature verification
Treating an unpinned GitHub release as an installable update
Changing bundled component manifests or download URLs
Showing an update action when the installed marker matches the bundled manifest
deliverables: Deterministic update status based on the trusted bundled manifest
Installed-version fallback to the verified component marker
Regression tests for matching and stale component markers
Accurate plugin version and update controls
acceptance_tests: Matching installed and bundled manifest versions return update_available false
A stale installed marker returns the bundled version as the available update
components.check_updates performs no live GitHub version lookup
A verified installed component never renders its version as uninstalled
Svelte and Rust regression suites pass
security_requirements: Only a package represented by the bundled digest-pinned manifest may be offered for installation
The frontend must not supply or override a component URL, version, or digest
